Video.summary: Millions were inspired by the first “Role of the Man” show. Now, Dr. Phil is making it an ongoing series and checking in with past guests. Remember the husband who provided everything for his wife…except intimacy? He’s back! Are they now sleeping in the same bed? Then, you’ll hear from the man who wanted his wife to have sex with him on demand. Did he change his selfish ways or is he still in the doghouse? Plus, what’s a mama’s boy to do when his wife insists he cut the umbilical cord once and for all?
Video.title: Man’s Role (Update)

Video.summary: From the outside, Jason and Shani had the perfect marriage " a big, beautiful house on the lake and three adorable boys " but recently Jason was crushed to learn that Shani's been having an affair with a mutual friend. Now, Shani is torn between her husband and her lover. What would you do?
Video.title: Is This Marriage Really Over?

Video.summary: When you imagine getting an inheritance, will your financial problems be solved or can the money be more trouble than it’s worth?
Video.title: Fighting Over the Will

Video.summary: From spending $600,000 on 3-year-old beauty queens, to pushy stage sisters and an ambitious boxing coach — today's guests say they go to the extremes to help the youngest members of their family excel. Meet two fathers, one whose full-time job is managing his tiny stars' careers, and the other who hand makes each and every one of his 4-year-old daughter's costumes. Are these dads bonding with their daughters or simply pushing too hard? Plus, meet several women who defiantly criticize child beauty pageants. And, hear from one overzealous sister and the father of a boxing champion once ranked first in the world. Can Dr. Phil convince these guests to step aside and strive for balance in their children's lives?
Video.title: Competing For The Title

Video.summary: Dr. Phil takes goes inside the unthinkable: making your own child sick to fulfill a disturbing need for attention. The idea might sound unimaginable, but for people with a psychological disorder called Munchausen by Proxy, it's irresistible. Note: Viewer discretion is advised.
Video.title: Munchausen Mom

Video.summary: Dr. Phil shares advice for dealing with rude, crude and obnoxious behavior from your family members.
Video.title: My Annoying Family

Video.summary: Shot in the face, disfigured for life, the former teen victim comes face to face with the girl who pulled the trigger. Can she forgive?
Video.title: The Girl Who Shot Me in the Face

Image.alt: The Girl Who Shot Me in the Face
The Girl Who Shot Me in the Face
The Girl Who Shot Me in the Face
The Girl Who Shot Me in the Face
The Girl Who Shot Me in the Face
The Girl Who Shot Me in the Face
The Girl Who Shot Me in the Face

Video.summary: He’s a tough-guy afraid of loosing his freedom. She’s been through two ugly divorces. So when the “M” word comes up, they head for the hills. Join these commitment-challenged singles as Dr. Phil uncovers the reasons why they won’t take the plunge. You’ll also meet a man who, after a four years in a loving relationship, doesn’t see the need to get married. To him it’s just a piece of paper. To her it’s a lot more. Find out if it’s really a “deal breaker.”
Video.title: Commitment Phobia

Video.summary: Parents are concerned about the extreme measures their daughters take to get and keep a boyfriend.
Video.title: Teens Obsessed with Love

Video.summary: Christina and Jim are divorced, and their 21-year-old daughter, Tara, is living with her dad and his new wife who just happens to be the same age as Tara. Christina claims Jim was a horrible husband and a narcissist and she was forced to walk away from the family when Tara was just 13. Since then, she says Jim has let Tara get away with anything and now even allows her to work as a webcam model in order to help pay the bills! She says he is turning their daughter into a raging, angry monster with low self-esteem.
Video.title: "My Ex & My Daughter" (Part 1)

Video.summary: Everyone knows people that love to bicker. But what happens when the bickering escalates into verbal abuse and violence? Dr. Phil checks in with past guests Troy and Tammy whose explosive arguing is the primary dynamic in their marriage. Have they been able to break the cycle of drama or are they one step closer to divorce? Then—meet a single mother of five who worries that her children’s bickering may lead to fatal consequences! She thinks they’re out of control. So why is her daughter pointing the finger at her? Dr. Phil helps her end the fighting once and for all.
Video.title: The Bickersons

Video.summary: Did a woman accused of fake pregnancies really lie?
Video.title: Baby Scam? Amie's Explosive Reply

Video.summary: Beka is a mom of three teenage girls who she says are angry, violent and out of control. She says an argument with her oldest daughter Arielle escalated to a life-threatening altercation when the 16-year-old stabbed her with a kitchen knife. Arielle was arrested and sent to juvenile detention for the incident, but is she remorseful? And are her 15-year-old identical twin sisters following in her footsteps? Beka says they are "evil" and have threatened to kill her too. But the twins tell a different story, claiming Beka is the one who is manipulative and abusive. They say she drinks excessively, has choked them and has even tried to take her own life. Can Dr. Phil get to the root of the real problem in this tumultuous household? Beka's husband, Jody, weighs in. Plus, Dr. Phil delivers a shocking message to this family in crisis -- Don't miss it.
Video.title: Stabbed In The Heart… By My Teen

Image.alt: Stabbed In The Heart… By My Teen
Stabbed In The Heart… By My Teen
Stabbed In The Heart… By My Teen
Stabbed In The Heart… By My Teen
Stabbed In The Heart… By My Teen
Stabbed In The Heart… By My Teen
Stabbed In The Heart… By My Teen

Video.summary: Ask any teenager, and he or she will tell you how tough life is: schoolwork, dating and dealing with pushy parents. But imagine having two kids while you're still in high school. Dr. Phil sits down with Corey and Kim, a troubled young couple, to see if their relationship can be saved.
Video.title: Troubled Teen Love

Video.summary: A woman accused her ex-husband of molesting her daughter.
Video.title: Child Molester or Innocent Soldier?

Video.summary: Couples who say their marriage is on the rocks due to debt.
Video.title: Marriage Crisis: Drowning in Debt

Video.summary: You've heard people complain, "If I only knew then what I know now, I wouldn't be in this mess," but what about those times when you choose not to see the writing on the wall? Dr. Phil meets couples who say their relationships went from bad to worse after they said, "I do," and now their families are broken.
Video.title: How to Fix a Broken Family

Image.alt: How to Fix a Broken Family
How to Fix a Broken Family
How to Fix a Broken Family
How to Fix a Broken Family
How to Fix a Broken Family
How to Fix a Broken Family
How to Fix a Broken Family

Video.summary: Melinda and Amy claim their lives have been turned upside down by a social media influencer and political activist named Paloma, who they say has subjected them to nine months of cyberbullying and harassment. Paloma says they’ve got it all wrong and that she is the victim of their cyberbullying. Who is the real victim? Will Dr. Phil convince these three women to “log off” from each other? Find out in this explosive episode!
Video.title: When Social Media Turns Toxic

Video.summary: Parents, listen up! Did you know that 94 percent of American kids ages 12 to 17 use the Internet, and 58 percent of them have an online profile? We're living in a digital world, where photos and other content can be published online for the world to see in an instant. You may not know it, but your child may be one click away from disaster.
Video.title: Busted Online

Video.summary: Are deadbeat dads actually dead broke dads? As the American economy struggles, men comprise most of the recent layoffs. In child support cases, are men and women treated equally in the courts, or are the laws out of touch with today's crisis? Dr. Phil's guests, along with Mel Feit, director of the National Center for Men, and Lis Wiehl, author and legal analyst, debate the issue that has many men feeling like the laws are against them.
Video.title: Fathers And Finance

Video.summary: One-time high school sweethearts Tracey and Doug started having marriage problems when Doug admitted to having an affair with a transgender female, Essence.
Video.title: A Most Unusual Love Triangle

Video.summary: Meet a “runaway bride” who’s already called off five weddings and she’s only 26! Then, meet another guest who’s frustrated because her fiancé won’t set a wedding date. He's canceled two previous engagements and says marriage "freaks him out." What does the future hold for these two? Plus, a heartbroken woman whose fiancé called the wedding off a month before her big day. Should she wait for him to come around? Find out what every bride needs to know before walking down the aisle.
Video.title: Left At The Altar

Video.summary: Angelique recounts escaping a life-threatening scheme while pregnant.
Video.title: Barely Escaping a Fetal Abduction

Video.summary: Parents suspect foul play in their daughter's alleged death by suicide.
Video.title: DP Mystery: Morgan’s Murder

Video.summary: Meddling moms who track and monitor their children's lives.
Video.title: Meddling Moms

Video.summary: A 7-year-old boy's knives fascination and violent imaginary friend injured teachers.
Video.title: Our 7yo Threatens to Kill Us!

Video.summary: Melanie says her 19-year-old daughter's boyfriend, Michael, is a gay, drug abusing gangbanger. What would cause her to have such a negative opinion of him? And is there any truth to her allegations? Learn why Michael initially agrees to a drug test, and then refuses. Will he finally break down and take it? And why does Melanie’s daughter, Caylin, support him anyway, regardless of the outcome? Then, Lori says her 17-year-old daughter, Mackenzie, is obsessed with a boy who's already broken up with her four times. Find out why Dr. Phil has a stern message for this mom.
Video.title: Hands Off My Teen Daughter

Video.summary: Baronica and Nathan say that on July 10, 2021, their then 9-year-old son shot his 8-year-old brother in the chest with one of six unsecured guns in their home. The parents bravely come forward to tell their story in hopes that other parents will learn from their mistakes. Then, Kristin says the last time she saw her 15-year-old son, Ethan, he was heading to his best friend’s house. Within hours, she was informed Ethan had been killed by an unsecured gun in his best friend’s house. Kristin has fought to have Ethan’s Law enacted in CT, which ensures that parents are held accountable for the safe storage of their weapons. And, hear from Susan, whose daughter Amanda was sitting on a park bench when she was shot by a group of young people, leaving her paralyzed. Plus, Ryan Busse, a former gun industry executive who says he left the industry after seeing how fear tactics were being used to sell guns, joins the conversation. This is a show every parent needs to watch -- whether you own a firearm or not.
Video.title: Unsecured Guns: Who’s to Blame?

Video.summary: Moms are accused of bullying their own children.
Video.title: Bully Moms

Video.summary: What happens when an unhealthy teen relationship threatens to tear a mother and daughter apart? Giesel says her 18-year-old daughter, Devynn, is obsessed with her boyfriend and is damaging a once promising future. Watch the drama unfold as a pregnancy scare rocks this teen's life.
Video.title: Teen Love Trauma

Video.summary: Laurie-Ann emailed Dr. Phil claiming she was robbed by her dangerous, narcissist ex-boyfriend and his new fiancée, Alison. She claims her ex, Michael, held her hostage for seven years. Laurie-Ann claims Michael and Alison are retaliating against her for breaking her silence and filing charges against Michael for domestic violence, emotional abuse, theft, and fraud. But Michael and Alison say Laurie-Ann is a liar who is always playing the victim. Michael says he never held her hostage; she only started to say that because he dumped her. Alison says she just wants Laurie-Ann to move on with her life, let them be happy, and stop stalking them. But Laurie-Ann says Alison doesn’t know how vindictive Michael really is and she claims he has turned everyone, including the police, against her. Laurie-Ann says she wants Dr. Phil to validate her story.
Video.title: Held Hostage By My Ex
